text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I happen to catch sight of a<n>meet and
greet for Silence Suzuka and<n>her fans. I decide to
take a peek.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Next up, we have the<n>highly-anticipated Q&A with
Suzuka!<n>Let's start with the fine gentleman<n>
over there who had his hand up first!

text_block_list.name: Low-Energy Fan
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, what do you do on your days<n>off?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well... On those days, I like to go<n>running.

text_block_list.name: Nervous Fan
text_block_list.text:
Um, what do you like to do when you<n>need a
change of pace?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I would go out for a run... I guess.

text_block_list.name: Hesitant Fan
text_block_list.text: Um... So, what about things you like?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I like... running...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, but...

text_block_list.name: Hesitant Fan
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Strawberry mochi... they're my<n>favorite.

text_block_list.name: Hesitant Fan
text_block_list.text: I-is that so?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Every single question that follows is<n>met with the
exact same<n>answer—running. The enthusiasm in<n>
the air starts to dwindle, until...

text_block_list.name: Intellectual Fan
text_block_list.text: W-well then, why do you run?

text_block_list.name: Intellectual Fan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Every time I see you crossing<n>the finish line,
you always seem... so<n>satisfied. I want to know
what it is that<n>elicits such an expression.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. I think that's because... I just<n>love
running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...There was a time when I thought<n>that winning
was everything. And so, I<n>ran solely for that
sake.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But after I met a lot of people and got<n>to run
together with them... I<n>remembered the pure,
untainted<n>feelings I started out with.

text_block_list.name: Serious Fan
text_block_list.text:
In that case, what's the most<n>enjoyable moment
when you run?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's... when I get to see the scenery<n>that I long
for.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've always loved that feeling...<n>Running free as
can be, alone... with<n>only the sound of my
rhythmic<n>footsteps resonating through the<n>
silence.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That scenery is so... breathtakingly<n>beautiful.
Even now, I run in search of<n>that same feeling.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...But that's not all—I also have other<n>things to
look forward to.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Now I can show all the people around<n>me a way
of running they've never<n>seen before... scenery
they've never<n>seen before.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've begun to appreciate... how<n>incredible that
really is.

text_block_list.name: Passionate Fan
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, the venue<n>comes alive. The
crowd starts to rattle<n>off question after question
about her<n>sentiments towards running.

text_block_list.name: Excited Fan
text_block_list.text: Are your fans included in those<n>people?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. For now and forever,<n>I'll keep
running, always chasing that<n>scenery.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I do this for myself and for those who<n>support
me... I want to show everyone<n>scenery they've
never seen before.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So... I ask for your continued support...<n>of my
running...
